title: Meghalaya PSC – Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach – 13 Posts
shortInfo: Meghalaya Public Service Commission (Meghalaya PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach. Candidates with B.F.Sc. or B.Sc, Diploma, Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Meghalaya PSC official website mpsc.meghalaya.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Meghalaya PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach Posts
basic_details.short_information: Meghalaya Public Service Commission (Meghalaya PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach. Candidates with B.F.Sc. or B.Sc, Diploma, Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Meghalaya PSC official website mpsc.meghalaya.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: For Fishery Officer: 18-27 years. For Junior Football Coach: 18-32 years. Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST, Govt. employees and athletes.

qualification.education_qualification: For Fishery Officer: B.F.Sc. or B.Sc (Pisciculture/Fishery Science). For Junior Football Coach: Graduate in any stream with Diploma in Sports Coaching from NSNIS or equivalent, OR 10+2 with Diploma in Sports coaching from NSNIS or equivalent for medalists.

salary_details.pay_scale: Fishery Officer: Level 12 of Revised Pay Structure. Junior Football Coach: Level 11 of Revised Pay Structure.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Meghalaya PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Meghalaya Public Service Commission Fishery Officer
